content: Our paper "Representation Alignment for Scientific Multimodal Models" was accepted by ICML 2026 (Oral).
paperTitle: Representation Alignment for Scientific Multimodal Models

content: I will serve as a student volunteer at AAAI 2026 and present our work on efficient scientific transformers.
paperTitle: Sparse Scientific Transformers for PDE Surrogates

content: I gave a talk at the NeurIPS 2025 AI for Science Workshop on decision-aware optimization.
Our paper on robust graph optimization was accepted by NeurIPS 2025.
paperTitle: Robust Graph Policies for Combinatorial Optimization

content: Started a summer research internship at Adobe Research, focusing on vision-language model evaluation.
Our work on scalable optimization under uncertainty received a spotlight at ICLR 2025.
Started the Ph.D. program in Computer Science at UC San Diego.
